summary: Good PowerShell conventions throughout (Set-StrictMode, error handling, explicit types). Workflow YAML follows best practices: actions/checkout@v4 pinned, minimal permissions (contents: read), proper shell: pwsh usage, sensible job dependencies (cleanup needs test). Module logic is pure, idempotent, and efficient. However, Test-Workflow.ps1 hardcodes test cases (lines 33–55) instead of data-driven design, reducing extensibility. The .actrc file dependency in line 62 is undocumented. Overall solid but test harness could be more modular.
